reason: Backend guideline index for saved preview quality checks.
Verify invalid preview ids and operation failures leave state unchanged.
Verify schemas, workspace confinement, tests, and forbidden patterns.
Verify saved previews do not append operation logs.
Verify artifact persistence and no metadata/history writes.
Verify durable saved preview contract is documented consistently.
Verify existing preview/diff helpers were reused.
Verify saved preview scope matches Phase 1 roadmap.
Verify hardening loop evidence and boundaries.
